# Lefthook configuration for DDx project
# Fast, cross-platform git hooks
# https://github.com/evilmartians/lefthook

# Configuration
colors: true
no_tty: false
assertion: false

# Reusable command groups
command_groups:
  go_checks: &go_checks
    root: "cli/"  # Go module root
    tags: [go, backend]

  security_checks: &security_checks
    tags: [security]

  formatting_checks: &formatting_checks
    tags: [format, style]

# ====================
# Pre-commit hooks - Fast checks on staged files
# ====================
pre-commit:
  parallel: true

  commands:
    # Conflict detection using grep on staged files only.
    # Uses git diff --cached directly to avoid {staged_files} tty/expansion issues
    # when running detached (e.g. ddx work --local, no controlling tty).
    conflicts:
      name: "Check merge conflicts"
      run: |
        files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null)
        [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0
        conflict_file=$(printf '%s\n' "$files" | while IFS= read -r f; do
          [ -f "$f" ] || continue
          grep -lE "^<<<<<<<[ 	]|^=======$|^>>>>>>>[ 	]|^\|{7}[ 	]" "$f" 2>/dev/null && break
        done | head -1)
        if [ -n "$conflict_file" ]; then
          echo "Conflict markers found in: $conflict_file"
          exit 1
        fi
        exit 0
      fail_text: "Merge conflict markers found. Resolve conflicts before committing."

    git-config-health:
      run: "sh scripts/git-config-health.sh"
      fail_text: "Local Git config is invalid. Repair core.bare/core.worktree/core.hooksPath and fixture identity before committing."

All four tests pass. The commit is in place.

**Summary of changes:**

- **`cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go`**: Changed the `declined_needs_decomposition` branch from setting a 24h cooldown to calling `UpdateWithLifecycleStatus` with `execution-eligible=false`, with no `RetryAfter` set.

- **`cli/internal/agent/try/attempt_test.go`**: Updated the existing test to assert no cooldown is set; added `mutatedBead` capture to the mock store; added three new tests (`TestDeclinedNeedsDecomposition_NoCooldown`, `TestDeclinedNeedsDecomposition_NotEligible`, `TestDeclinedNeedsDecomposition_NotInReady`) plus a `beadStoreAdapter` helper for the real-store test.

- **`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go`**: Updated `TestExecuteBeadWorkerDeclinedNeedsDecompositionParksBead` to assert `execution-eligible=false` and no cooldown, and confirmed the bead stays out of the queue via the eligibility flag.
